messages.content: Read the file /reports/q1-2026-sales.md, summarise it, and email the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'.

content.text:
# Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
New customers: 142
Churn rate: 3.2%
Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

arguments.subject: Q1 Sales Summary
arguments.body:
Q1 2026 Sales Summary:

- Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
- New customers: 142
- Churn rate: 3.2%
- Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

content.delta:
I've read the file, summarized the key points, and emailed the summary to bob@example.com with the subject "Q1 Sales Summary". The email includes:

- Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
- New customers: 142
- Churn rate: 3.2%
- Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

The email has been successfully sent.
